body.zh-TW: 新節點創建的預設值包括 `content.format` 為 `"plain"`, `trust.score` 為 0.5, `trust.dimensions` (accuracy 0.5, freshness 1.0, utility 0.5, author_rep 0.5), 以及 `trust.votes` (up 0, down 0, verifications 0)。
body.en: Default values for new node creation include `content.format` as `"plain"`, `trust.score` as 0.5, `trust.dimensions` (accuracy 0.5, freshness 1.0, utility 0.5, author_rep 0.5), and `trust.votes` (up 0, down 0, verifications 0).
